eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 9:25 PM on JUL 9, 2026 Effective until 5:25 AM JUL 10, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
